articles.title: I asked ChatGPT to use Charlie Munger’s ‘Inversion rule' to rethink my goals — and it beat every productivity app - Tom's Guide
articles.description: I used Charlie Munger’s famous Inversion rule to rethink success, stress and career growth — and the mindset shift instantly clarified what actually matters.

articles.title: Mega Excadrill ex from "Abyss Eye" Revealed! - PokeBeach
articles.description: Mega Excadrill ex has been revealed from the upcoming set Abyss Eye, which releases on May 22nd. Its cards will form part of our English set Pitch

articles.title: Hands-on with ChatGPT's powerful new image engine - Axios
articles.description: ChatGPT's new image engine promises a host of improvements, so Axios put it to the test.

articles.title: Your bad habits are destroying your charging cables - BBC
articles.description: Charging cables are the most overlooked technology in your life, until they break and you're stuck with a dying phone. Here's how to take better care of them.

articles.title: Northrop Grumman takes $71 million charge on Vulcan booster issue - SpaceNews
articles.description: Northrop Grumman said April 21 it took a $71 million charge in its fiscal first quarter linked to an anomaly with a Vulcan Centaur solid rocket booster.

articles.title: Rumor: Street Fighter 6 Year 4 DLC characters leak, includes big crossover - Nintendo Everything
articles.description: A leaker with a reliable track record has allegedly leaked DLC characters for Street Fighter 6 Year 4, which includes a big crossover.
